# Cascading Labs

> Cascading Labs is building the future of data and algorithms, starting with web data and finance.

## Projects

- [Yosoi](/yosoi): AI-powered CSS selector discovery for web scraping. Discover selectors once with an LLM, cache them, and scrape forever at zero cost.
- [QScrape](https://qscrape.dev): Purpose-built fictional scraping targets for benchmarking and testing web scrapers.

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/CascadingLabs)
- [Yosoi Docs](/yosoi)
- [Yosoi llms.txt](/yosoi/llms.txt)
